questions.question: According to Paul Milgram, what does Mixed Reality (MR) encompass?
options: The entire spectrum between the Physical World and Virtual Reality
questions.explanation: MR is the broader technical term for the entire middle ground where physical and digital objects co-exist and interact.

questions.question: Why do industrial sectors prefer Head-Mounted Displays (HMDs) over Handheld AR for guided assembly?
options: HMDs offer hands-free workflows and higher 'presence'
HMDs do not require a Wi-Fi connection
questions.explanation: Hands-free operation is critical for industrial workers who must use their hands for assembly while viewing digital instructions.

questions.question: What is the 'Friction Factor' in mobile AR deployment?
options: The physical drag of the device
The 70% user drop-off caused by requiring a native app download
The heat generated by the GPU
The difficulty of scanning a QR code
questions.explanation: WebAR mitigates friction by allowing users to access content instantly through a browser without an App Store download.
